test_cases.scenario: sync API (POST /api/repositories/sync) calls syncWorktreesAndCleanup which triggers tmux session cleanup for deleted worktrees
test_cases.evidence: src/app/api/repositories/sync/route.ts line 49 calls syncWorktreesAndCleanup(db, allWorktrees). syncWorktreesAndCleanup checks syncResult.deletedIds and calls cleanupMultipleWorktrees -> cleanupWorktreeSessions -> killWorktreeSession for each. Unit tests in tests/unit/session-cleanup.test.ts verify cleanupWorktreeSessions calls killSessionFn for all 5 CLI tools (claude, codex, gemini, vibe-local, opencode). syncWorktreesAndCleanup tests confirm cleanup is triggered when deletedIds is non-empty.

test_cases.scenario: scan API (POST /api/repositories/scan) calls syncWorktreesAndCleanup for tmux cleanup
test_cases.evidence: src/app/api/repositories/scan/route.ts line 54 calls syncWorktreesAndCleanup(db, worktrees). Same cleanup path as sync API. Response includes deletedCount and cleanupWarnings fields.

test_cases.scenario: restore API (PUT /api/repositories/restore) calls syncWorktreesAndCleanup for tmux cleanup
test_cases.evidence: src/app/api/repositories/restore/route.ts line 64 calls syncWorktreesAndCleanup(db, worktrees). Integration test in tests/integration/repository-exclusion.test.ts mocks syncWorktreesAndCleanup and verifies the restore flow works correctly.

test_cases.scenario: clone-manager calls syncWorktreesAndCleanup with error handling (IA-MF-002)
test_cases.evidence: src/lib/git/clone-manager.ts line 535 calls syncWorktreesAndCleanup(this.db, worktrees) inside try-catch. Line 542 comment confirms IA-MF-002: syncWorktreesAndCleanup failure does not break clone success. Errors are logged but execution continues.

test_cases.scenario: server.ts excludedPaths deletion calls cleanupMultipleWorktrees before deleteWorktreesByIds
test_cases.evidence: server.ts lines 226-234: For each excludedPath, gets worktreeIds, calls 'await cleanupMultipleWorktrees(worktreeIds, killWorktreeSession)' BEFORE deleteWorktreesByIds. This ensures SF-002: cleanup -> delete order is maintained.

test_cases.scenario: Session kill failure does not break sync (partial success)
test_cases.evidence: Unit test 'should return syncResult even if cleanupMultipleWorktrees throws' in session-cleanup.test.ts confirms syncResult is returned even when cleanup fails. syncWorktreesAndCleanup wraps cleanup in try-catch (session-cleanup.ts lines 262-266) and returns generic error message. Test 'should continue processing after individual errors' confirms cleanupWorktreeSessions processes all 5 CLI tools even when first one throws.

tests/integration/api-repository-delete.test.ts: All 10 tests pass including delete, cascade, security validation, exclusion, and cleanup verification. DELETE route (src/app/api/repositories/route.ts) still uses cleanupMultipleWorktrees + killWorktreeSession directly (not syncWorktreesAndCleanup), preserving existing behavior.

test_cases.scenario: cleanupMultipleWorktrees uses Promise.allSettled for parallel execution (SF-003)
test_cases.evidence: src/lib/session-cleanup.ts lines 162-165: 'const settled = await Promise.allSettled(worktreeIds.map(worktreeId => cleanupWorktreeSessions(worktreeId, killSessionFn)))'. Unit test 'should cleanup all worktrees' verifies 3 worktrees x 5 CLI tools = 15 killSession calls. Test 'should return empty results for empty worktree list' verifies edge case.

src/lib/session-cleanup.ts lines 257-260: Detailed warnings logged server-side only, client receives generic message: '${cleanupResult.warnings.length} session cleanup warning(s) occurred'. Unit test 'should return sanitized warnings when cleanup fails' verifies cleanupWarnings do not contain internal path '/path/to/secret'.

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: POST /api/repositories/sync 実行時に、DBから削除されるworktreeの対応tmuxセッションがkillされること
POST /api/repositories/scan 実行時にも同様にtmuxセッションがクリーンアップされること
POST /api/repositories/restore 実行時にも同様にtmuxセッションがクリーンアップされること
clone-manager.ts 経由の同期でも同様にクリーンアップされること
server.ts の excludedPaths 削除処理でも同様にtmuxセッションがクリーンアップされること
tmux list-sessions に孤立セッションが残らないこと
セッションkill失敗時にsync処理自体は成功すること（部分的成功を許容）
既存のリポジトリ削除（DELETE /api/repositories）の動作に影響がないこと
パフォーマンス対策が実装されていること（並列実行 Promise.allSettled）

test_summary.unit_tests: 265 passed, 1 failed (unrelated: git-utils detached HEAD test)

message: すべての受入条件を満たしています。Issue #526の実装は9項目すべての受入基準をPASSしました。1件のテスト失敗(git-utils.test.ts)はIssue #526とは無関係です。
